infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PantrySwipe uses your camera to scan barcodes and automatically add food items to your pantry.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PantrySwipe needs access to your photo library to let you share food photos in your posts.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PantrySwipe uses your location to show nearby food posts and restaurants.

plugins.cameraPermission: PantrySwipe uses your camera to scan barcodes and automatically add food items to your pantry.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: PantrySwipe uses your location to show nearby food posts and restaurants.
